basic_details.job_title: ABV IIITM Gwalior Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD or equivalent (D.Sc.), First class (≥ 6.5 CGPA / 60%) in UG & PG, At least one degree from CFTI or QS ≤500 foreign university, Age maximum 35 years, Apply within 5 years from PhD defense
qualification.details: PhD or equivalent from a recognized institute/university. First class (≥ 6.5 CGPA / 60%) in Undergraduate (UG) and Postgraduate (PG) studies. At least one degree or work experience from a CFTI (Centrally Funded Technical Institution) or a QS ranked ≤ 500 foreign university. Application must be submitted within 5 years from the PhD defense date. At least 3 SCI/SSCI/SCIE indexed publications, with at least one publication in a Q1 journal.

selection_process: Shortlisting by Screening Committee Technical presentation Personal/Technical interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ABV IIITM Gwalior Post-Doctoral Fellow (IPDF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ABV IIITM Gwalior IPDF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Post-Doctoral Fellow (IPDF) position is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the IPDF post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Post-Doctoral Fellow (IPDF) position announced by ABV IIITM Gwalior.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the IPDF role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD or equivalent degree, with first-class marks in UG and PG. Additionally, at least one degree or work experience from a CFTI or a QS ≤ 500 foreign university is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the IPDF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 70,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IPDF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting by a Screening Committee, followed by a technical presentation and a personal/technical interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for the IPDF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application with all required documents to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. In which state and city is ABV IIITM Gwalior located?
faq.answer: ABV IIITM Gwalior is located in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh.
